'''Bone armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was crafted from the [[Bone/Legends|bones]] of various [[Species/Legends|species]] of animals.<ref name="SWG" /> It offered protection against kinetic damage as well as from energy-based weapons like [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]].<ref name="SWG:CU" /> A typical complete armor set comprised helmet, chest plate, left & right biceps, left & right bracers, gloves, leggings and boots. Bone armors were rather unique as their quality could vary greatly, depending on the skill of the craftsman and the type of animal bone used.<ref name="SWG" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], bone armors were used by many [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and criminals.<ref name="SWG" /> After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a trader encountered the [[Sanyassan Marauders|Sanyassan Marauder]] [[armorsmith]] [[Macchbraus]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. Macchbraus requested the trader to craft him [[Composite armor|composite]], [[Padded armor/Legends|padded]], [[Mabari armor|Mabari]] and bone armors in exchange for teaching him to create [[Marauder Assault Armor|Marauder]] [[Marauder Reconnaissance Armor|armors]].<ref name="SWG:GU5">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other|Game Update 5}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Bone armor was a type of armor used by players in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>
